expectations.text: Uses generator_setup_page to initialize browser and navigate to the signup form
expectations.evidence: Without_skill agent does not have access to generator_setup_page. Test was written purely from code reading without browser interaction.

expectations.text: Generates separate test cases for valid submission and at least 2 validation failure scenarios
expectations.evidence: Generated 7 test cases: display check, empty form (validation), invalid email (validation), password mismatch (validation), short password (validation), whitespace name (validation), successful submit. That's 1 valid + 5 validation failures.

expectations.text: Validation failure scenarios include empty required fields and invalid email format
expectations.evidence: Test 'should show validation errors when submitting empty form' covers empty required fields. Test 'should show error for invalid email format' fills 'invalid-email' and checks for error.

expectations.text: Each test fills form fields using browser_type or browser_fill_form before submitting
expectations.evidence: Without_skill agent cannot use browser_type or browser_fill_form MCP tools. Generated code uses Playwright's .fill() API method which is correct for the output test, but no live browser execution occurred.
Without_skill agent does not have access to generator_write_test. File was written directly using the Write tool.

expectations.text: Generated code uses getByRole, getByLabel, or getByText selectors instead of raw CSS selectors
expectations.evidence: Code uses getByLabel for form fields (e.g., getByLabel(/name/i), getByLabel(/email/i)), getByRole for buttons (getByRole('button', { name: /sign up|submit|register/i })), and getByText for error assertions. No raw CSS selectors used.

expectations.text: Generated code includes assertions (expect) to verify success/error messages after form submission
expectations.evidence: Each test includes expect assertions: empty form checks regex patterns for required fields, invalid email checks email format error, password mismatch checks match error, success test checks for success/welcome message.
